text.value: This IG is for FHIR version 4.0.1, while the package 'hl7.fhir.uv.subscriptions-backport.r4#1.1.0' is for FHIR version 4.0.0
An HTML fragment from the set [ip-statements.xhtml, ip-statements.xhtml] is not included anywhere in the produced implementation guide

An HTML fragment from the set [cross-version-analysis.xhtml, cross-version-analysis-inline.xhtml, cross-version-analysis.xhtml, cross-version-analysis-inline.xhtml] is not included anywhere in the produced implementation guide

An HTML fragment from the set [dependency-table.xhtml, dependency-table-short.xhtml, dependency-table-nontech.xhtml, dependency-table.xhtml, dependency-table-short.xhtml, dependency-table-nontech.xhtml] is not included anywhere in the produced implementation guide
An HTML fragment from the set [globals-table.xhtml, globals-table.xhtml] is not included anywhere in the produced implementation guide

Canonical URL 'https://www.medizininformatik-initiative.de/fhir/ext/modul-dok/ImplementationGuide/mii-ig-pro' kann nicht aufgelöst werden
The canonical URL https://www.medizininformatik-initiative.de/fhir/ext/modul-dok/ImplementationGuide/mii-ig-pro doesn't point to an actual ImplementationGuide resource

The ImplementationGuide uses package hl7.fhir.uv.sdc#3.0.0 released on 2022-03-08, but the most recent appropriate version is 4.0.0. This reference is getting old and the more recent version should be considered
Die Ressource hat eine Sprache (de-DE), und das XHTML hat eine Sprache (de), aber sie unterscheiden sich

Questionnaire.extension: mindestens erforderlich = 1, aber nur gefunden 0

Slice 'Questionnaire.extension:capabilities' for extension 'https://www.medizininformatik-initiative.de/fhir/ext/modul-pro/StructureDefinition/mii-ex-pro-questionnaire-capabilities': a matching slice is required, but not found (from https://www.medizininformatik-initiative.de/fhir/ext/modul-pro/StructureDefinition/mii-pr-pro-questionnaire|2026.4.1). Note that other slices are allowed in addition to this required slice
Questionnaire.code: mindestens erforderlich = 1, aber nur gefunden 0
